memoryArtifacts.headline: Alice Mohun
memoryArtifacts.description:
No Meek Subservient She!
The Mohun family had benefited by siding with King John, their closeness to those who ran the country paved the way for an advantageous marriage. The Mohun's had as a family m …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Mohun於1222年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Reginald II de Mohun17歲，母親Hawise FitzGeoffrey15歲。她於1245年與Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch在英國薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年在英國薩默塞特哈契享年62歲，埋葬在英國戴文梅波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Mohun于1222年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Reginald II de Mohun17岁，母亲Hawise FitzGeoffrey15岁。她于1245年与Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch在英国薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年在英国薩默塞特哈契享年62岁，埋葬在英国戴文梅波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Mohun was born in 1222, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, Reginald II de Mohun, was 17 and her mother, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, was 15. She married Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch in 1245, in Dunster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1284, in Hatch, Somerset, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Membury, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Mohun est née en 1222, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reginald II de Mohun, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch en 1245, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1284, à Hatch, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Membury, Devon, Angleterre.

de.Hatch Beauchamp, Taunton, Somerset, Engl: Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Mohun 1222 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald II de Mohun 17 und ihre Mutter Hawise FitzGeoffrey 15. Sie hat 1245 in Dunster, Somerset, England Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hatch, Somerset, England und wurde in Membury, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Mohun è nata il nel 1222 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, Reginald II de Mohun, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch nel 1245, nel Dunster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1284, nel Hatch, Somerset, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Membury, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Mohunが1222年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Reginald II de Mohunは17歳，母Hawise FitzGeoffreyは15歳であった。1245年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターでRobert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年にイギリスソメルセトハトチで62歳で死去し，イギリスデボンメンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Mohun(이)가 1222년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald II de Mohun(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise FitzGeoffrey(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 서머세트 해트치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Mohun nasceu em 1222, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald II de Mohun, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch em 1245, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1284, em Hatch, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Membury, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Mohun родилась в 1222 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald II de Mohun было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise FitzGeoffrey, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch в 1245 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1284 г. в местности хач, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности мембури, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Mohun nació en 1222, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald II de Mohun, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Hawise FitzGeoffrey, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Robert de Beauchamp Lord of Hatch en 1245, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1284, en Hatch, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Membury, Devon, Inglaterra.
